programs.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programs.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complicated murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programs.title: Death in Paradise
programs.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programs.title: Death in Paradise 15
programs.desc: Detective Mervin Wilson (Don Gilet) returns to the charming island of Saint Marie - a tropical corner of the Caribbean full of sun, which, however, hides numerous secrets beneath its idyllic surface.The investigator is still trying to find his place here.He is also taking on further criminal cases.He investigates, among other things, the circumstances of the poisoning of a local newspaper reporter, the alleged attack of a legendary beast on a lecturer, and the death of a professional killer.Additionally, he intervenes when the body of a couples therapist is found on the beach of a luxury resort.Additionally, an unexpected meeting with his stepbrother draws him into a series of unexpected events.

programs.title: Blue Lights
programs.desc: Young policemen start working at a police station in Belfast.They immediately face difficult tasks, as they fight drug-trafficking gangs, paramilitary organizations, secret agents and representatives of the local community who do not intend to comply.Officers are on the front line.They come into contact with people from different backgrounds - they have made bad decisions or are completely lost.For most of them, law enforcement officers primarily provide advice on how to get back on track.Meanwhile, the attention of the new employees is drawn to the sudden lull in the investigation conducted on many fronts into a local criminal group.
